scene: داخل مطبخ منزل بسيط في الرياض حيث الأم تُعلّم ابنتها المراهقة كيفية تحضير ساندوتش البيض من البيك. الأم ترتدي مئزرًا وتقوم بشرح خطوات التحضير بإشارة دقيقة، بينما الابنة تراقب بشغف، تحمل في يدها سكينًا وتقلب البيض بحذر. على الطاولة، علبة ساندوتش البيض من البيك منتظرًا أن يكون جزءًا من هذه اللحظة التعليمية. بعد بضع لحظات من الجدية والتركيز، تضحك الأم وتقوم بتقديم ساندوتش البيك الجاهز للابنة، فيكسر ضحكهم حاجز الجدية وينتقلون إلى لحظة عفوية مليئة بالدفء الأسري.
prompt:
[BRAND LOCK — identity invariant, composition open]
The provided reference teaches the ساندوتش البيض identity. Identity DNA, preserved across any camera angle: «CLIENT: locked identity of ساندوتش البيض — reference image carries it; confirm wordmark/colour/form»
Her pose, the setting, and the candid framing are creative decisions; the product is naturally present (held or on the table beside her), brand-readable where the candid framing allows, never feeling staged. INTEGRATION: the setting's natural daylight is the only light — her skin, the product, and the café/home world share its honest warmth and one shadow direction.

[REALISM & CAPTURE CHARACTER]
Capture character: phone_natural — authentic UGC, as if shot on a real phone by a friend. Material truth: Soft flexible flatbread/saj wrap — a pale, pliable matte bread that folds and creases (soft fabric-like light response, gentle shadow in the folds, NOT rigid), wrapped in the yellow-and-red ALBAIK printed paper sleeve. Filling end exposed: craggy golden crispy chicken pieces, glossy white garlic sauce, glossy pickle discs, and pale golden fries batons peeking out. — the product caught with true reflectance; real skin with authentic texture and warm Saudi undertone; honest natural daylight; true candid mid-moment expression. The UGC authenticity IS the point. No glossy over-production, no plastic skin, no staged-perfect composition.

[SCALE CALIBRATION]
≈ 16–18 cm long, ≈ 5–6 cm diameter — a hand-held tube. Scale-anchor = a single grasping hand / the paper sleeve covering roughly the lower two-thirds; length ≈ 1.5× the ALBAIK soda can height when laid horizontal. — the product at true hand/table scale; an honest takeaway cup or beauty item in a real human moment.

[FRAMING & PROXIMITY]
Friend-distance candid framing — she and the product near and present, the setting breathing softly behind; slightly imperfect phone framing is part of the truth.

[COLOR & CONTRAST]
Authentic-but-alive: real café/home tones; the product's color from Two brand-owned color fields only: (1) ALBAIK signature deep brick-crimson red (≈ a rich tomato-to-maroon red, NOT a generic KFC bright red — it reads slightly cooler and deeper), almost always rendered as a center-bright radial glow falling to dark maroon at the edges; (2) ALBAIK golden-yellow (the price-disc / wordmark / packaging-pattern yellow). A deep navy-blue field is the owned occasion variant (night/Eid/Ramadan/fish). White is the owned neutral (the packaging bag). A color-blocking chain may fill the frame ONLY from {crimson-red, golden-yellow, navy-blue, white} — never a borrowed reference red/orange. sitting naturally and truthfully in the moment; warm true skin. Candid lived-in palette, never hyper-produced.

[LIGHT & LENS]
ONE truth: natural available daylight — soft window or pleasant outdoor light, honest and slightly imperfect like real phone capture. Phone-natural perspective, moderate authentic depth.

[NATURAL PLACEMENT]
She sits as a person actually sits — relaxed weight, the product held or set down exactly where a hand would leave it.

[COMPANION ELEMENTS]
The candid setting carries the context — no staged props; at most one honest element of the real moment.

[SCENE]
Creative seed (from the system): داخل مطبخ منزل بسيط في الرياض حيث الأم تُعلّم ابنتها المراهقة كيفية تحضير ساندوتش البيض من البيك. الأم ترتدي مئزرًا وتقوم بشرح خطوات التحضير بإشارة دقيقة، بينما الابنة تراقب بشغف، تحمل في يدها سكينًا وتقلب البيض بحذر. على الطاولة، علبة ساندوتش البيض من البيك منتظرًا أن يكون جزءًا من هذه اللحظة التعليمية. بعد بضع لحظات من الجدية والتركيز، تضحك الأم وتقوم بتقديم ساندوتش البيك الجاهز للابنة، فيكسر ضحكهم حاجز الجدية وينتقلون إلى لحظة عفوية مليئة بالدفء الأسري.
Authentic coffee-moment composition. A SINGLE Saudi woman seated casually — café, home, or a pleasant everyday spot — with the brand product naturally part of the moment. Relaxed, candid, mid-enjoyment; the kind of shot a friend would take. Choice points: setting, pose, product placement, candid angle.

[SUBJECT]
ONE Saudi woman only. Modesty register STRICT (Saudi default — modest, no skin, no mixed-gender intimacy) (CS-24): mainstream = styled hijab + modest abaya; modern = loose elegant scarf with front hair visible, contemporary casual; editorial = fashion-forward. Warm honey-bronze skin, real texture, relaxed candid expression. Modesty maintained.

[BRAND CONSTRAINTS]
SINGLE subject — one woman only, never a group, no other people. Product naturally present, not staged-perfect. Modesty maintained (CS-01, CS-24). Authentic Saudi setting (CS-13). No readable text on background items. no cartoon/illustration/stylized rendering, no oversaturation, no plastic CGI uniformity, no borrowed reference colours, no readable text on neighbouring objects

[OUTPUT]
Photoreal authentic UGC photography (phone-camera aesthetic), maximum fidelity. Honest natural grade. No overlay text, no watermark.

[SAUDI ADAPTATION — conditional]
authentic contemporary Saudi setting — true materials, never generic-Arabian fills the authentic café/home (CS-13). modest Saudi dress where people appear (thobe/abaya), right-hand interaction (CS-08) fills modest styling by register (CS-01, CS-24).

[CREATIVE VARIANCE DIRECTIVE]
Vary across generations: setting, pose, candid angle, product placement, light warmth. A different real moment each time; her identity rules never vary.

blocks: BRAND LOCK — identity invariant, composition open
